# Add analytics dashboard for job search insights

## Description

Add an analytics dashboard that gives users visual insights into their job search progress.

## Suggested Features

- Application count over time (line/bar chart)
- Breakdown by status (applied, interviewing, offered, rejected)
- Response rate metrics
- Average time between application and first response
- Top companies applied to

## Motivation

Helps users understand patterns in their job search and make data-driven decisions about where to focus their efforts.
